MASTER CALENDAR JURY

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Continued To Mar-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica Wiley; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Robert Cohen, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff Deutsche Bank National Trust Company, as Trustee, represented by agent: John Farrell.
Anthony Soldato, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Alberto Gonzalez.
The Judge Pro Tem Elliot Miles, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207 for settlement discussions with a related action from the morning Trial Calendar.
Case did not settle & matter is taken off calendar.
Dept. 206 will continued the matter for trial to a later date.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Cohen, Esq., 800-492-2657 for plaintiff and opposing party Deutsche Bank National Trust Co.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT LUIS ALBERTO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Jacqueline Chan CSR # 10276 (301/PJB)
